lines.speaker: HAIDER
lines.line: Alright, Iqrash, we got this. Hadi's been quiet lately, he's due for a hit.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of HAIDER, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: IQRASH
lines.line: I don't know, man. Hadi's not one to back down from a fight.
lines.visual_cue: Close-up of HAIDER, his eyes gleaming with aggression as he cracks his knuckles.

lines.speaker: HAIDER
lines.line: Don't worry, I've got a plan. We'll take him down, and then we'll be the top dogs in this city.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of IQRASH, his brow furrowed in concern as he glances around the alleyway.

lines.speaker: IQRASH
lines.visual_cue: Close-up of HAIDER, his grin twisted and menacing.

lines.speaker: HAIDER
lines.line: We'll set up an ambush, and then we'll take him out. Easy as that.
lines.visual_cue: Close-up of IQRASH, his eyes darting back and forth between Haider and the alleyway.

lines.speaker: HAMMAD
lines.line: Hey, guys, why don't you settle this like civilized people? In the annual car race, of course.
lines.visual_cue: Wide shot of the alleyway, with HAIDER and IQRASH standing in the center, looking confident and aggressive.

lines.speaker: HADI
lines.line: Alright, baby, you're going to need to bring your A-game if we're going to take down Haider and Iqrash.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of HADI, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: HADI
lines.line: This engine's been tweaked to perfection. I can feel it in my bones, we're going to win this thing.
lines.visual_cue: Close-up of HADI, his eyes fixed intently on the engine as he works on it with precision and care.

lines.speaker: HAIDER
lines.line: You think you can take me down, Hadi? I've been waiting for this moment for years.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of HAIDER, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: HADI
lines.line: I'm not just looking to take you down, Haider. I'm looking to crush you.
lines.visual_cue: Close-up of HAIDER, his eyes blazing with aggression and competitiveness.

lines.speaker: HADI
lines.line: Come on, Haider! You can't keep up with me!
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of HADI, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: HAIDER
lines.line: I'm not going down without a fight!
lines.visual_cue: Close-up of HADI, his eyes fixed intently on the road ahead as he skillfully navigates the track.

lines.speaker: HAIDER
lines.line: I...I didn't think you had it in you, Hadi.
lines.visual_cue: Medium shot of HAIDER, expression intense and focused.

lines.speaker: HADI
lines.line: You shouldn't have underestimated me, Haider. I'm the best driver in this city.
lines.visual_cue: Close-up of HAIDER, his eyes downcast in defeat as he looks at Hadi's victorious car.
